completedItems: Enhanced the chat header date control in `app/src/routes/chat/+page.svelte` with a clearer current viewport date label, message-count summary, `aria-controls`, and animated chevron state.
Kept date groups derived from persisted Convex message timestamps already returned by the bounded indexed `api.chat.listMessages` query, without introducing non-serializable load state.
Improved initial viewport positioning so loaded conversations settle at the latest messages and the header date matches the represented viewport context.
Changed date jumps to target the sticky day divider for more stable scroll positioning, preserving smooth scroll and highlight feedback without relayout-heavy behavior.
Added outside-pointer closing for the date dropdown while preserving Escape and focus-out closing behavior.
Verified older-message reply flow remains wired after date navigation because jump only changes scroll/active date state and reply target selection/composer state remains local to the route.
unfinishedItems: Manual Convex wipe/seed workflow and hands-on keyboard/mouse/hover testing were not performed in a live browser during this worker pass.
`.DS_Store` was already modified in the working tree and was intentionally left untouched/uncommitted.

issuesDiscovered: Impeccable PRODUCT.md/DESIGN.md context files are absent, so UI polish used existing route design patterns and the product register inference rather than documented brand tokens.
Generated Convex files produce existing lint warnings about unused eslint-disable directives.
Live browser manual testing was not run, so visual smoothness assertions are based on code review and automated checks rather than observed seeded interaction.

validationAssertionsTouched.notes: Header date control displays the active viewport date beneath the agent title/avatar area and now includes a message-count summary for that date.
Dropdown lists each `messageDays` group derived from persisted message timestamps returned by the bounded Convex query.
Selecting a date closes the menu, sets active/highlighted date state, and smoothly scrolls the message history to that day divider.
Implementation avoids data reloads and layout mutation during date jumps, but live seeded browser testing was not performed.
Reply controls remain available after date jumps and composer reply-target state is independent from date dropdown/scroll state.
